behaviors.description: The review input is scoped to the lines that changed, not the full content of each modified file.
behaviors.justification: Failure boundary is module handoff: diff extraction must pass only changed hunks into review-input assembly. A unit test of one parser can miss regressions where another module re-expands to full file content. Rejected System because behavior text does not require real PR/network/OS. Rejected Agentic/Workflow because this is input-shaping correctness, not model-output quality.
behaviors.test_description: Wire diff-reader + input-builder with in-process fixtures containing both changed and unchanged lines; assert emitted review payload includes only changed-line context and excludes unchanged file regions across multi-file patches.

behaviors.description: Inline comments are attached to the correct positions in the diff view on the pull request.
behaviors.justification: Real failure depends on GitHub diff-position semantics over real HTTP API (line vs side vs commit SHA mapping). Mocks often accept invalid mappings that GitHub rejects or repositions. Rejected Agentic/Workflow because no model judgment is required.
behaviors.test_description: Against a real test PR, post inline comments using computed positions and verify returned comment objects render on intended changed lines in the PR diff (not file-level fallback or wrong hunk).

behaviors.description: The agent identifies at least one real defect in a pull request that contains a known introduced bug.
behaviors.justification: Pass/fail depends on real model judgment quality (detecting an actual bug), which stubs cannot validate. Rejected Workflow because behavior asks for one detection outcome, not multiple agentic decisions in sequence.
behaviors.test_description: Run analysis with the real model on a seeded PR containing a known bug; assert at least one finding correctly targets that bug class/location.

behaviors.description: Every finding listed in the top-level summary corresponds to a posted inline comment ID from the same run.
behaviors.justification: This is cross-module state consistency (inline-post results must be joined into summary payload). In-process wiring catches dropped/mismatched IDs. Rejected System: real network is not required to reproduce ID-correlation bugs. Rejected Agentic/Workflow: no dependence on model output quality.
behaviors.test_description: Execute posting pipeline with deterministic finding fixtures and stubbed PR API responses returning comment IDs; assert every summary entry references an ID created in that same execution context/run token.

behaviors.description: No inline finding is dropped from the final summary payload before posting.
behaviors.justification: Failure appears in orchestration/aggregation between modules (collector, transformer, summary builder), not in a single pure function. Rejected System because real PR API is unnecessary to catch pre-post payload loss. Rejected Agentic/Workflow because behavior is deterministic completeness, not model-quality dependent.
behaviors.test_description: Feed N inline findings through end-to-end local pipeline up to summary-post request construction; assert payload contains all N findings with stable identity mapping.

behaviors.description: The automation sequence (read diff, post inline comments, post summary) succeeds for a real pull request when provided a fixed precomputed finding set.
behaviors.justification: Behavior explicitly requires a real PR and end-to-end HTTP interactions; real API/auth/rate-limit/position handling failures are hidden by mocks. Rejected Agentic/Workflow because findings are fixed precomputed (no model-quality dependency).
behaviors.test_description: Run the full sequence against a real repository PR using fixed findings; assert diff read succeeds, inline comments are created, and summary comment posts with expected references.

behaviors.description: The full live run with model-generated findings (read diff, analyze, post inline comments, post summary) completes correctly for a real pull request without manual intervention.
behaviors.justification: Run includes a real model-generation step whose output governs downstream posting; stubbing would hide failures from malformed/empty/off-target model output. Rejected Workflow because behavior text names a single agentic stage ('analyze') followed by deterministic posting stages, not multiple agentic decisions chained.
behaviors.test_description: Execute true end-to-end run on a real PR with live model analysis enabled; assert pipeline completes unattended and produces valid inline comments plus a summary linked to created comments.
